mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.group_id AS "group.id", a.reason AS "reason", a.log AS "log", a.imgs AS "imgs", a.info AS "info", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.icon AS "u.icon", u.sex AS "u.sex",
`group`.name AS "group.name", `group`.idno AS "group.idno"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid LEFT JOIN t_group `group` ON `group`.id = a.group_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_tousu( id, uid, group_id, reason, log, imgs, info, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{group.id}, #{reason}, #{log}, #{imgs}, #{info}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_tousu SET uid = #{u.id}, group_id = #{group.id}, reason = #{reason}, log = #{log}, imgs = #{imgs}, info = #{info}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
